text.headline: M.Chem Chemistry — University of Durham
text.text: Studied M.Chem (hons) Chemistry at the University of Durham, with a 4th-year dissertation on photoactive complexes of multimetallic assemblies.

text.headline: Ph.D. Physical Chemistry — University of Durham
text.text: Doctoral research into highly conjugated arylene ethylene systems.

text.headline: Post-Doc — JM / Durham University
text.text: Modelled, prepared and analysed novel catalyst bed materials at the intersection of industry and academia.

text.headline: PDRA — Heidelberg University
text.text: Extended my research portfolio in photophysics and arylene ethynlenes for a stint in Germany.

text.headline: Post-Doctoral KTS Fellowship — P&G / Durham University
text.text: Developed hardware and software for real-time multi-spectrum video analysis to identify product defects at the manufacturing line.

text.headline: Senior Scientist – Organic Materials' Integration
text.text: Lead analyst and process development scientist on iUK project to develop the UK's first fully organic QVGA display (OLED). Developed bespoke Python scripts for automated analysis and high-volume wafer test data reporting.

media.credit: Centre for Process Innovation — National Formulation Centre

text.headline: Senior Research Scientist – Informatics
text.text: Consulting tech lead and analyst on ERF grant scheme projects. Technical lead on a £400K data capture platform implementation.

text.headline: Senior Data Scientist – Operations — Pragmatic Semiconductor
text.text: Applied statistical and ML techniques across a ~100-step semiconductor manufacturing process. Deployed ensemble models (Random Forest) for causal inference — directly contributing to >40% yield improvement in a single month.

text.headline: Head of Manufacturing Intelligence
text.text: Built and lead a multifunctional data team (DBA · DE · DA · DS · MLEng) across the UK and Europe. Directed a CNN-based wafer-map yield classifier project, deployed a self-service data portal API, and owned C-Suite KPI dashboards. Implemented DevOps/MLOps practices and supported successful ISO 27001 accreditation.

text.headline: Enterprise Data and AI Lead
text.text: Directing a cross-platform team of software and data engineers to deliver a scalable data architecture leveraging lakehouse principles. Deploying internal LLM to unlock learning from document stores.
